rationale: Educ. Code §39.031 governs payment of assessment instrument costs from agency appropriations. It has no connection to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts or school district revenue recapture.
quote: The cost of preparing, administering, or grading the assessment instruments and releasing the question and answer keys under Section 39.02301(m) shall be paid from amounts appropriated to the agency.
_note: No textual or operational conflict between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this assessment-cost provision.
